name: New Potatoes in Butter Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes.
2. Peel a strip around the middle of each potato, leaving the peel on both ends.
3. Boil until tender and drain most of the water.
4. Add the stick of butter to a pan.
5. Liberally sprinkle chives and seasoned salt over the potatoes.
6. Gently stir the mixture as the oil melts.
7. Serves 4 to 6.
